response.overview: A short film about a life-changing moment... One day, while Seyfo (35) is herding his sheep, one of them strays from the flock. As he follows it, he sees the sheep disappear behind a rock. When Seyfo climbs up to get a better view, what he witnesses leaves him stunned. This short film tells the story of how that moment changes Seyfo’s life forever.
response.title: I’m Not Work Anymore
